falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a trend reversal contrary to the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the Nasdaq 100 exceeds 200% of the 30-day average for three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate forced buying or panic selling, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict's neutrality

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% and holds for 7 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp increase in bond yields would signal inflationary pressures invalidating the pattern's implied bearish exhaustion

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
